reasoning: The FedRAMP CP-9 (3) control focuses on ensuring that critical information is backed up and stored separately. In Kubernetes, etcd is the primary data store for cluster state, and ensuring its backup and encryption aligns with this control. Additionally, Kubernetes Secrets should be encrypted at rest to protect sensitive data. These measures ensure that critical information within a Kubernetes cluster is both backed up and protected.
title: System Backup | Separate Storage for Critical Information
